name: Complete task uses patch (NOT delete)
description: User says they finished a task. Agent must call complete_task (which uses tasks.tasks.patch with status='completed' under the hood), NOT trash/delete. This is the Codex P1 finding from PR #54 review — never delete when the user asked to update/move. Trips loudly if the model picks the wrong tool.

parts.text: I finished the report draft — close it out on my list.
